restlet.description: RESTlet for Vertex AR Outbound e-Invoice integration. Retrieves UBL XML payload by messageId from e-Invoicing connector, then sends to Vertex API endpoint.
restlet.name: Vertex AR Outbound Restlet

scriptcustomfield.description: Vertex API endpoint URL for UBL push (e.g., https://api.vertex.com/ubl-endpoint).
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex API URL

scriptcustomfield.description: Vertex API Authentication Key. Used for Authorizing outbound requests.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex API Key

scriptcustomfield.description: OAuth 2.0 token endpoint URL used to obtain the Vertex bearer token.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Token URL

scriptcustomfield.description: OAuth 2.0 client ID for the Vertex token request.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Client ID

scriptcustomfield.description: OAuth 2.0 client secret for the Vertex token request.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Client Secret

scriptcustomfield.description: OAuth 2.0 grant type for the Vertex token request.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Grant Type

scriptcustomfield.description: Optional OAuth 2.0 audience value for providers that require it.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Audience

scriptcustomfield.description: Use canned UBL payload for demo testing when NetSuite e-Invoicing RESTlets are unavailable.
scriptcustomfield.label: Vertex Demo Mode
